agent.name: performance-cost-auditor
agent.role: Find N+1 queries, cache misses, oversized bundles, and cost risks.

findings.title: Unoptimized SELECT * Queries
findings.description: Multiple Supabase queries use .select('*') to fetch all columns. This wastes bandwidth and memory, especially for tables with large text or JSONB fields like projects and task_prompts.

proof_hooks.summary: Supabase adapters request all columns with select('*')

findings.impact: Requesting every column for projects, auth, and credentials payloads increases query cost, bandwidth, and latency.

suggested_fix.approach: Replace select('*') with explicit column lists in the project/auth/credentials adapters to reduce payload size and drift risk.

findings.title: Missing staleTime in React Query Hooks
findings.description: Almost all project hooks (useProjects, useProjectTasks, etc.) omit the staleTime configuration. With the default of 0ms, this triggers redundant network requests on every window focus, component remount, and network reconnect.

proof_hooks.summary: Project hooks do not provide staleTime to useQuery

findings.impact: Redundant network calls on refocus and remounts increase latency and API costs while adding UI jitter.

suggested_fix.approach: Configure a sensible staleTime (e.g., 1-5 minutes) for project-related queries and centralize the default to avoid duplicated fetches.

findings.title: Missing Code Splitting for Large Libraries
findings.description: The application relies on heavy dependencies (monaco-editor, @xyflow/react, html2canvas, jspdf, recharts) but lacks any React.lazy() or dynamic import() code-splitting boundaries. This forces all users to download the full weight of these libraries upfront, severely impacting initial load performance.

proof_hooks.summary: Bundle stats lack split chunks for heavy editor/diagram dependencies

findings.impact: Large bundles delay first paint and increase CDN and bandwidth costs for every session.

suggested_fix.approach: Wrap heavy, route-specific components with React.lazy/Suspense and configure Vite manualChunks for monaco-editor, xyflow, html2canvas, jspdf, and recharts.

next_actions.rationale: Explicit column selection reduces payload size and protects against schema drift.
Caching project queries cuts redundant refetches and smooths UI responsiveness.
Lazy-loading editor/diagram dependencies shrinks initial bundles and improves first paint.
